candidates.why: Separate operating depreciation line, but not labelled as COGS/cost of sales and appears at the same level as broader operating expense lines rather than as a COGS-specific component.
Separate operating depreciation line, but not specifically tied to COGS and therefore not clearly addable to the selected COGS bucket without risking misclassification.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Licenses, Copyrights, Property Rights & Designs
candidates.why: Amortization line in the operating section, but not identified as related to cost of goods sold.
Operating amortization line, but not identified as related to cost of goods sold.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is only 'Cost of Goods Sold'. No explicit depreciation/amortization row is identified as belonging to COGS/cost of sales. The visible D&A rows are generic operating lines, so adding them to COGS would risk double counting or misallocation.

candidates.why: Separate operating depreciation line shown alongside Other External Expenses and Personnel Expenses. Since the selected XSGA bucket excludes depreciation/amortization rows, this appears to sit outside those selected rows and should be added separately to overhead.
Separate operating depreciation line at the same level as the selected overhead components, not a subcomponent of them. It appears excluded from the selected XSGA rows and should be added separately.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Licenses, Copyrights, Property Rights & Designs
candidates.why: Separate operating amortization row. No dedicated R&D row is present, and it is outside the selected XSGA component rows, so it is the best available amortization item to add separately.
Separate operating amortization row outside the selected XSGA component rows. Include only because no clean amortization summary excluding impairment is available.

final_choice.row_label: Amortization of Licenses, Copyrights, Property Rights & Designs

variables.notes: Selected XSGA reference bucket is 'Other External Expenses' plus 'Personnel Expenses'. The statement presents depreciation/amortization as separate same-level operating lines, so they do not appear embedded in those selected rows. The only apparent summary row, 'Depreciation and impairment of intangible assets', is avoided because it includes impairment, which should not be added. Therefore component D&A rows are chosen instead; blank/zero-only 'Amortization of Intangibles' is not selected.
